items.content:
About This Role

Our Software Engineering Internship is a 12-week program designed for students and recent graduates who are eager to gain hands-on experience building real products. You will be embedded in one of our engineering teams and work on meaningful projects that ship to production.

Interns are treated as full team members with dedicated mentors, access to all company resources, and the opportunity to present their work to the entire engineering organization at the end of the program.

Responsibilities

  • Contribute to production codebases alongside experienced engineers
  • Participate in sprint planning, daily standups, and code reviews
  • Complete a capstone project that addresses a real product or infrastructure need
  • Attend tech talks, workshops, and social events organized for the intern cohort

Requirements

  • Currently pursuing a BS or MS in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
  • Familiarity with at least one programming language (JavaScript, Python, Java, or Go)
  • Understanding of fundamental data structures and algorithms
  • Strong problem-solving skills and eagerness to learn
  • Available for a full-time, 12-week commitment

Nice to Have

  • Previous internship or co-op experience in software development
  • Personal projects or open-source contributions on GitHub
  • Experience with web development frameworks (React, Node.js, Django)
